case_title: DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP VS. RAUL ROCHA SOSA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $24.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOSA, RAUL ROCHA FALCON-SANTANA, CARMITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 238 LEAVENWORTH STREET, #23, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA, RAUL ROCHA FALCON-SANTANA, CARMITA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND BY MAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP SERVED SEP-12-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FALCON-SANTANA, CARMITA
DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA, RAUL ROCHA FALCON-SANTANA, CARMITA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA, RAUL ROCHA FALCON-SANTANA, CARMITA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED BY MAIL AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP SERVED SEP-12-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA, RAUL ROCHA
